$comment: Provenance record — emitted by EVERY mutation in the stack: memory writes (③), tool calls (⑤), workflow steps (⑥), policy changes (⑦). Validated by tools/validate_provenance.py.

on_behalf_of.description: required when kind=agent — the delegation chain root

target.description: what was acted on: node_id, account ref, resource

why.description: the intent — one line a future auditor can act on

source.description: upstream trigger: event_id (②), workflow step (⑥), human request

approved_by.description: human principal ids; ≥1 for human_ratify, ≥2 distinct for multi_party

capability_token.description: token id, if this action was authorized by token instead of approvers

workflow_id.description: ties multi-step processes into one auditable chain (⑥)

dry_run.description: true = the action was simulated, not executed

cross_field_rules: risk_tier in [T0,T1] => reversible must be true
risk_tier == T2      => gate.mode in [human_ratify, multi_party] and approved_by non-empty
risk_tier == T3      => gate.mode == multi_party with ≥2 distinct approvers, OR gate.capability_token present
gate.mode == forbid  => record documents a REFUSED action; dry_run/refusals are logged too
